creator: mac@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
Update and fix install problem

updated:
- update for Window Maker 0.61.1
- DEPEND for *new* devel/libPropList
- add some locale by supported Window Maker

fixing:
- 'make install' problem is from Window Maker's po files problem.
  New Version of po files is fixed. :-)

Fix: apply this patch.
and remove patches/patch-b[bd]

-----
